name: io.github.api-jarvisclaw/jarvisclaw
title: JarvisClaw — AI API Gateway
description: 80+ AI models (GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen), smart routing, pay per call via x402 USDC. No API key needed — any agent with a USDC wallet can pay per request. OpenAI-compatible. Supports chat, images, video, audio, embeddings, web search, crypto data, and compute sandbox.
